title: chrysophyllum marginatum var. tomentosum
intro: Chrysophyllum marginatum var. tomentosum, also known as the velvet capachouca, is a plant species within the Sapotaceae family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum marginatum var. tomentosum include its potential to help manage fever, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine practices.
